# Orbit — portal submission

**Title:** Orbit

**Tagline:** Drop and merge cosmic orbs — fuse your way to the star.

**Controls:** Tap/drag to aim, release to drop. Arrow keys + Space on desktop.

**Tags:** puzzle, casual, physics, merge, mobile, hypercasual, highscore, suika

**Description:**
Drop colourful orbs into the jar — two matching orbs that touch fuse into a bigger one, scoring points and triggering a satisfying burst. Work your way up through 11 tiers from tiny blue spheres all the way to the blazing Sun. Merge two Suns for a supernova bonus. Don't let the pile overflow the top line or it's game over. Easy to learn, impossible to put down.

## Where to upload
- itch.io  (Kind: HTML, check 'mobile friendly', set viewport ~520x720, upload orbit.zip)
- CrazyGames developer portal (HTML5; add their SDK for rev-share before submitting)
- GameDistribution / Playgama Bridge (one build to many portals)

> Reminder: integrate a portal SDK's rewarded-video before monetized submission; itch.io accepts the plain zip as-is for the first real-world signal.
